mission.title: in-toto: 13 use validators for the models
mission.description:
This patch series refactors code in the models and adds the validate function to ensure the properties of a model are populated properly. I also added unit tests for these methods.

closes #13

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
